name: LMR Layered Oxide Raman
description: Raman peak assignments for LMR layered oxide samples. Source: rin/data/RAMAN 데이터 정리.pptx, slides 9-11.

assignments.name: LMR Eg mode (O-TM-O bending)
assignments.note: PPTX range: 476-503 cm-1. Slide 11 defines Eg as O-TM-O bending vibration.

assignments.name: LMR A1g mode (TM-O symmetric stretching)
assignments.note: PPTX range: 600-609 cm-1. Slide 11 defines A1g as TM-O symmetric stretching.

assignments.name: LiMO2 A1g position marker
assignments.note: PPTX slide 10 sample A1g positions: 589.5-591.6 cm-1.
